title: Dragonfly Origin
description: An evolving dragonfly origin. Power information in images.
body:
A fully fledged evolving dragonfly origin! Created using the Origins Creator by MathGeniusZach
It evolves from (water-based)Larvae to (air-based)Dragonfly to an Adapted Dragonfly. It's a powerful speedster origin, that starts off weak but soon ramps up in power.
Enjoy!

Hint for evolving: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To become a predator, you should capture one yourself.
And to become the best predator, you should kill the one reigning supreme.

</details>


Icon from Mo Creatures Mod. (Minecraft Mobs Wiki)
